steps.title: Find the two angle measures
steps.content: A transversal through parallel lines creates four angles of one measure and four supplementary angles. If one angle is $(6x-210)^\circ$, the other measure is $$180-(6x-210)=390-6x.$$

steps.title: Compare answer choices to possible sums
steps.content: The other choices appear in the possible-sum list. Choice A, $-12x+1260$, does not; the matching coefficient case gives $-12x+960$, not $-12x+1260$. A is correct.
